top_signals.title: Hyperliquid ETFs attract record $25.5 million in net inflows as institutions pile in
top_signals.summary: U.S. spot HYPE ETFs saw $25.5 million in net inflows on Wednesday, marking their largest positive flows since launch.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
